ownerFullName: Billy Gene Is A.I. & XR Marketing 🌐

caption:
I did my first $1M/month when I was 29 years old.
Not because I was smarter.
Not because I was lucky.
Because I was EARLY.
And here’s what nobody tells you about being early…
You get called a scammer.
When I went all in on Facebook ads… scammer.
When I pushed YouTube ads… “that doesn’t work.”
When I ran the first AI marketing event… fear-mongering.
When we pivoted during COVID… hesitation everywhere.
Same pattern. Every. Single. Time.
Lesson #1:
👉 If everyone agrees with you, you’re already too late.
Lesson #2:
The game isn’t “working hard.”
The game is having what the marketplace wants BEFORE everyone else does.
That’s it.
That’s the cheat code.
And the earlier you are…
the more people will doubt you.
Lesson #3:
👉 Being first = being misunderstood.
You have to be okay with people thinking you’re crazy
before they call you a "Geneius"
If you need validation… you’re not built for opportunity.
Lesson #4:
Speed kills.
Not talent.
Not intelligence.
Speed.
By the time your favorite guru is talking about it…
I’ve already made millions doing it.
Lesson #5:
I’ve been doing this for 15+ years.
Everything you’re watching…
everything you’re chasing…
I’ve already seen it. Done it. Taught it.
So when I tell you right now:
👉 AI
👉 Interactive funnels
👉 Building agents 
This isn’t hype.
This is your window.

ownerFullName: Billy Gene Is A.I. & XR Marketing 🌐

caption:
Have you ever been jealous before? 

It's something I've struggled with for my entire life...

6 or 7 years ago I went to this "internet marketing" event called Traffic and Conversion summit.

I remember watching my dude Ryan deiss on stage thinking fuck I want to be on that stage. I got so damn jealous! 

And it kept happening... Id keep going to these events and the entire time in the back of my mind I'd be thinking of ways to get in "their" shoes. 

Then I made a decision:

1. Keep sitting here feeling like a jealous insecure bitch 

Or 

2. Use that as fuel and motivation to make shit happen. 

6 years later here I am Keynoting Day 2 on the main stage. 

Thanks T&C it was an honor and a blessing but if im keeping it 100 I still got jealous. 

I got jealous because I wasn't the day 1 keynote, Arnold Schwarzenegger was lol. 

Let me be clear, I'm very aware Arnold is on a different level than me. 

But me setting what others deem as an "unrealistic" goal
Is what got me here in the first place.

Besides Arnold is 73, I'm 32 so I guess I got some time. 

Cheers to turning our weaknesses into our strengths.

1) She said she watched your webinar and was turned off by you coming on camera with a drink in your hand. 😂😂😂 
2) She said she couldn't use your company because she wants to pay someone to manage social media for her, not learn to do it herself.
Back to #1, I was like, this dude gets results & he doesn't seem like the kind of man that will change up his successful business model to be accepted by 1 new client, so maybe he's not a good fit for you if being an #Imposter is your criteria. Dude keeps it real and he's funny #af.
Anyway, what companies can you refer that will work with a 70-yr young old school mentality person? Anyone I can recommend? No shade at her age, but when they stuck in their ways, that's all we got to work with.

ownerFullName: Billy Gene Is A.I. & XR Marketing 🌐

caption:
They say "dream big". 

Growing up my biggest "dream" never included traveling on private jets. 

So I think the idea is to dream big annually. 

Because if we're progressing our version of "big" will constantly be challenged. 

Anyways, to some people this picture is a group of guys flexing on a pj. 

To me this is me flexing my brain on the idea of what's possible. 

Geneius > Genius. 

P.S. Shit like this is only possible because of "we" not me. Shout out to everyone in this pic and then some, my brothers for life. And my girl who gave me permission to go to Vegas lol.
